What we do

Services

Gardening, pressure washing, gutter cleaning — all done properly, by one person who gives a damn.

  • Gardening & Lawn Care

    Mowing, edging, weeding, hedging, and garden maintenance. Weekly, fortnightly, or one-off.

  • Pressure Washing

    Driveways, paths, patios, fences, and hard surfaces blasted clean.

  • Gutter Cleaning

    Gutters cleared of leaves, debris, and blockages. Downpipes checked and flushed.

View all services
Where we work

Across Adelaide

Based in Newton, happy to travel. If you're in metro Adelaide, get in touch — chances are we cover your area.

Newton Norwood Burnside Kensington Toorak Gardens Prospect Walkerville North Adelaide Adelaide CBD Unley Hyde Park Parkside Fullarton Mitcham Glenelg Brighton Henley Beach West Lakes Modbury Tea Tree Gully
Why GreenEdge

Why choose us

Owner-operated

Harrison does every job himself. No subbies, no strangers at your house — the same person every time.

Fully insured

Public liability covered. Work done properly and backed up.

Tidy finish, every time

Green waste removed, hard surfaces blown down, site left clean. Every job, no exceptions.

Free quotes, no pressure

Come out, look at the job, give you a straight price. No obligation.

Our story

One person. One standard.

GreenEdge Property Care is Harrison Lelli — a young Adelaide tradie with a passion for gardening and a thing about doing work properly.

It started simply: a genuine love of making outdoor spaces look their best, and a frustration with services that cut corners or send whoever's available that week. GreenEdge is the answer to that — one person, consistent quality, real care for every yard he works on.

One year in and growing. If you want your property looking sharp, call Harrison.

🌿

Owner-operated

Harrison does every job himself. You know who's coming.

📅

Est. 2025

Young business, serious about building a reputation on results.
